Intent: To strike terror into the hearts of enemies and conquer them.
Ritual_Action: Wash the stave in lead, print it on thy forehead between thy brows with spittle or blood.
The_Incantation: I bear the Helm of Awe / Between my brows! / Let all who look upon me / Quake with fear! / I am the serpent, / I am the bear! / My gaze is iron, / My will is stone!

Intent: To find one's way through rough weather and unknown paths.
Ritual_Action: Carve this sign on a piece of wood, or trace it in blood upon thy forehead.
The_Incantation: Through storm and sleet, / Through fog and fear, / The Wayfinder guides, / The path is clear! / Though the sky be dark, / And the land be strange, / My steps are sure, / My home is near!

Intent: To discover a thief who has stolen from thee.
Ritual_Action: Carve this on the bottom of a wooden bowl. Fill it with clear water and gaze into it until the face of the thief appears.
The_Incantation: Water clear, / Show me here! / Who took my goods? / Who stole my gear? / Face of the thief, / Rise from the deep! / Secrets revealed, / No more to keep!

Intent: To win the love of a woman.
Ritual_Action: Carve this sign on a piece of cheese or bread and give it to the woman to eat without her knowing.
The_Incantation: Love me, love me, / As I love thee! / Heart to heart, / Bound to be! / By Freya's grace, / By Odin's might, / Be mine forever, / Day and night!

Intent: To protect a house from evil spirits and thieves.
Ritual_Action: Carve this sign on the doorpost of thy house using consecrated wood.
The_Incantation: Door be strong, / Wall be stout! / Evil enter not, / Keep it out! / Spirits dark, / Flee this place! / Safety and peace, / Fill this space!

Intent: To win a lawsuit or legal dispute.
Ritual_Action: Carry this stave in thy pocket or sewn into thy clothes when going to the Thing.
The_Incantation: Tyr, give me justice! / Forseti, give me peace! / My words be true, / My cause be right! / Judges listen, / To my plea! / Victory is mine, / So mote it be!

Intent: To make a woman pregnant.
Ritual_Action: Carve this sign on a piece of cheese and give it to the woman.
The_Incantation: Seed be sown, / Life be grown! / Womb be fruitful, / Child be known! / Freyr bless thee, / With life anew! / Mother's joy, / Come to you!

Intent: To open a lock without a key.
Ritual_Action: Place the stave against the lock and blow into the keyhole.
The_Incantation: Iron yield, / Brass give way! / Lock spring open, / Without delay! / By dwarf's craft, / And giant's might, / Open wide, / To my sight!

Intent: To kill an enemy's cattle.
Ritual_Action: Carve on a piece of horse bone and throw it into the enemy's field.
The_Incantation: Cattle fall, / Sickness call! / Wither and die, / One and all! / Enemy's wealth, / Turn to dust! / Ruin and rot, / As it must!

Intent: To prevent barrels from leaking.
Ritual_Action: Carve on the top and bottom of the barrel.
The_Incantation: Wood be tight, / Hoops be strong! / Ale stay in, / Where you belong! / Leak no drop, / Waste no more! / Full to the brim, / Forevermore!

Intent: To ensure victory in Glíma wrestling.
Ritual_Action: Keep Gapaldur under the heel of the right foot.
The_Incantation: Gapaldur below, / Ginfaxi above! / Strength of the bear, / Grip of the wolf! / Throw my foe, / To the ground! / Victory is mine, / Renown is found!

Intent: To ensure victory in Glíma wrestling.
Ritual_Action: Keep Ginfaxi under the toes of the left foot.
The_Incantation: Ginfaxi guide, / My steps be true! / Balance and power, / See me through! / Opponent falls, / I stand tall! / Champion of all, / In the hall!

Intent: To prosper in trade and business.
Ritual_Action: Carve on a piece of beech wood and carry it in thy purse.
The_Incantation: Gold come in, / Silver flow! / Wealth and riches, / Let them grow! / Fair trade made, / Profit gained! / Fortune smiles, / Unrestrained!

Intent: To open hills and find hidden treasure.
Ritual_Action: Carve on a wand of rowan wood and tap the hill three times.
The_Incantation: Hill open wide, / Treasure show! / Gold and silver, / Wait below! / Ancient secrets, / Come to light! / Riches vast, / Shine so bright!

Intent: To put someone into a deep sleep.
Ritual_Action: Place under the pillow of the person you wish to sleep.
The_Incantation: Sleep deep, / Sleep long! / Wake not up, / To bird's song! / Heavy eyes, / Weary head! / Slumber bound, / Like the dead!

Intent: To protect against drowning.
Ritual_Action: Carve on the oar or the side of the boat.
The_Incantation: Ran, stay back! / Aegir, be kind! / Safe passage home, / Let me find! / Waves be still, / Waters calm! / Protect my life, / From all harm!

Intent: To protect a house from fire.
Ritual_Action: Carve on the hearthstone or above the fireplace.
The_Incantation: Fire burn bright, / But burn not here! / Hearth be safe, / Have no fear! / Logi's hunger, / Stay away! / Warmth and light, / Let them stay!

Intent: To speak well and be persuasive.
Ritual_Action: Carve on the tongue of an eagle or a raven and carry it.
The_Incantation: Words flow free, / Tongue be wise! / Persuade all, / With no lies! / Eloquence grant, / Speech be bold! / Listeners captive, / Stories told!

Intent: To harden one's heart and gain courage.
Ritual_Action: Draw on the left breast with blood.
The_Incantation: Heart of steel, / Will of stone! / Fear no man, / Stand alone! / Courage rise, / Terror flee! / Brave and strong, / I shall be!

Intent: To cause fear in an enemy.
Ritual_Action: Carve on an oak tablet and throw it at the enemy's feet.
The_Incantation: Panic strike, / Terror bind! / Fear consume, / Heart and mind! / Flee in dread, / Run away! / Coward's fate, / Yours today!

Intent: To create a circle of protection around oneself.
Ritual_Action: Draw a circle on the ground with a staff of hazel.
The_Incantation: Circle round, / Safe and sound! / Evil spirits, / Be not found! / Holy ground, / Sacred space! / Protection strong, / In this place!

Intent: To ensure butter churns quickly and well.
Ritual_Action: Carve on the bottom of the churn.
The_Incantation: Cream turn thick, / Butter come! / Churning stick, / Beat the drum! / Golden fat, / Rise to top! / Dairy magic, / Never stop!

Intent: To protect against trolls and giants.
Ritual_Action: Carve on a stone and bury it near the house.
The_Incantation: Trolls stay back, / Giants flee! / Stone protects, / This I see! / Mountain folk, / Leave us be! / Safe from harm, / We shall be!

Intent: To protect against all evil and harm.
Ritual_Action: Write on parchment and carry in a pouch.
The_Incantation: Valdemar's sign, / Power divine! / Shield from evil, / Guard this line! / No harm come, / No ill befall! / Protected safe, / Within this wall!

Intent: To force a thief to return stolen goods.
Ritual_Action: Carve on a wooden tablet and place it where the goods were stolen.
The_Incantation: Thief return, / What you took! / Guilty conscience, / Like a hook! / Drag you back, / To this spot! / Give it up, / Before you rot!

Intent: To confuse an enemy and make them lose their way.
Ritual_Action: Draw on the path the enemy will take.
The_Incantation: Path be twisted, / Way be lost! / Mind be clouded, / At great cost! / Wander aimless, / Round and round! / Never knowing, / Where you're bound!

Intent: To cure a headache.
Ritual_Action: Place the stave on the forehead.
The_Incantation: Pain be gone, / Head be clear! / Ache depart, / Disappear! / Healing touch, / Soothing balm! / Restful peace, / Quiet calm!

Intent: To cure insanity or madness.
Ritual_Action: Carve on lead and hang around the neck.
The_Incantation: Mind be whole, / Thoughts be sane! / Madness flee, / Leave this brain! / Clarity return, / Reason reign! / Peace of mind, / Once again!

Intent: To banish ghosts and restless spirits.
Ritual_Action: Hold the stave towards the ghost and command it to leave.
The_Incantation: Spirit leave, / Go away! / Find your rest, / Don't you stay! / To the grave, / Or beyond! / Break the tie, / Cut the bond!

Intent: To summon the dead to speak.
Ritual_Action: Draw on the grave of the deceased.
The_Incantation: Rise from grave, / Speak to me! / Secrets tell, / Set them free! / Voice from past, / Come to light! / Answer questions, / In the night!

Intent: To protect cattle from disease and predators.
Ritual_Action: Carve on the barn door.
The_Incantation: Cattle safe, / Cows be well! / Sickness flee, / Cast a spell! / Wolf stay back, / Bear go 'way! / Herd protect, / Night and day!

Intent: To make sheep bear twins.
Ritual_Action: Carve on the ram's horn.
The_Incantation: Ram be strong, / Ewe be lush! / Lambs be two, / In a rush! / Flock increase, / Wool abound! / Shepherd's joy, / All around!

Intent: To catch a seal.
Ritual_Action: Carve on the harpoon or club.
The_Incantation: Seal come near, / Don't be shy! / Hunter waits, / Don't ask why! / Skin and meat, / Fat and bone! / Provide for us, / In our home!

Intent: To protect a ship from storms and sinking.
Ritual_Action: Carve on the mast or the rudder.
The_Incantation: Hull be strong, / Sail be true! / Wind be fair, / Skies be blue! / Safe harbor reach, / Journey's end! / Ship protect, / Round the bend!

Intent: To cleanse oneself of evil and bad luck.
Ritual_Action: Draw in water and wash thy face and hands.
The_Incantation: Water wash, / Cleanse my soul! / Evil go, / Make me whole! / Bad luck fade, / Good luck come! / Fresh start now, / For this one!

Intent: To catch a fox.
Ritual_Action: Carve on the trap or snare.
The_Incantation: Fox be tricked, / Snare be tight! / Fur be mine, / Before the night! / Cunning beast, / Meet your end! / Hunter's prize, / Round the bend!

Intent: To attract fish to the hook or net.
Ritual_Action: Carve on the sinker or the float.
The_Incantation: Fish come here, / Bite the hook! / Fill the net, / Take a look! / Cod and haddock, / Salmon too! / Plenty catch, / For me and you!

Intent: To stop bleeding from a wound.
Ritual_Action: Press the stave against the wound.
The_Incantation: Blood stay in, / Flow no more! / Wound be closed, / Like a door! / Healing start, / Pain subside! / Life preserve, / Turn the tide!

Intent: To steal butter from a neighbor's churn.
Ritual_Action: Carve on a stick and point it at the neighbor's house while churning.
The_Incantation: Butter fly, / From their churn! / Into mine, / Twist and turn! / Theirs be thin, / Mine be fat! / Cream be stolen, / Just like that!

Intent: To steal milk from a neighbor's cow.
Ritual_Action: Draw on the milking pail.
The_Incantation: Milk flow here, / From their cow! / Fill my pail, / Here and now! / Theirs go dry, / Mine run o'er! / Plenty milk, / More and more!

Intent: To change the weather.
Ritual_Action: Raise the stave to the sky and command the elements.
The_Incantation: Wind shift round, / Clouds depart! / Sun shine down, / Warm my heart! / Or rain come down, / Water ground! / Weather change, / All around!

Intent: To reverse a curse sent against thee.
Ritual_Action: Carve on a mirror or reflective surface and face it towards the sender.
The_Incantation: Curse return, / To sender go! / Back on them, / Let it flow! / Evil wish, / Bounce right back! / Harm them now, / In attack!

Intent: To become invisible or unnoticed.
Ritual_Action: Carry the stave in a pouch made of black cat skin.
The_Incantation: Seen by none, / Hidden well! / Shadow cloak, / Cast a spell! / Walk unseen, / Pass on by! / Invisible, / To the eye!

Intent: To gain physical strength.
Ritual_Action: Draw on the muscles of the arms.
The_Incantation: Muscles swell, / Power grow! / Strength of giant, / Let it show! / Lift the heavy, / Break the strong! / Mighty force, / All along!

Intent: To run fast and tireless.
Ritual_Action: Draw on the soles of the feet.
The_Incantation: Feet be swift, / Wind be fast! / Run like deer, / First to last! / Tire not, / Speed increase! / Race be won, / Find release!

Intent: To see things far away or hidden.
Ritual_Action: Draw on a piece of glass and look through it.
The_Incantation: Eyes be sharp, / Vision clear! / Far away, / Bring it near! / Hidden things, / Now revealed! / Secrets shown, / Unconcealed!

Intent: To hear whispers and distant sounds.
Ritual_Action: Draw behind the ear.
The_Incantation: Ears be keen, / Sounds be loud! / Whispers catch, / In the crowd! / Distant noise, / Bring it close! / Secrets heard, / Friends and foes!
